originalDescription: Create a Discord category for the helix project with #general, #updates, and #dev channels. Set up a webhook on the #updates channel for automated notifications. Store channel IDs in protolab.config at the repo root. Document the Discord integration in docs/.
sanitizedDescription: Create a Discord category for the helix project with #general, #updates, and #dev channels. Set up a webhook on the #updates channel for automated notifications. Store channel IDs in protolab.config at the repo root. Document the Discord integration in docs/.
